Program Listing for File slint_builtin_structs_internal.h
=========================================================

|exhale_lsh| :ref:`Return to documentation for file <file_cppdocs_generated_include_private_slint_builtin_structs_internal.h>` (``cppdocs/generated_include/private/slint_builtin_structs_internal.h``)

.. |exhale_lsh| unicode:: U+021B0 .. UPWARDS ARROW WITH TIP LEFTWARDS

.. code-block:: cpp

   #pragma once
   // This file is auto-generated from xtask/src/../../api/cpp/cbindgen.rs
   #include "private/slint_builtin_structs.h"
   #include "private/slint_enums_internal.h"
   #include "private/slint_point.h"
   #include "private/slint_image.h"
   #include "private/slint_keys.h"
   namespace slint::cbindgen_private {
   enum class KeyEventType : uint8_t;
   using slint::language::KeyboardModifiers;
   struct PointerEvent {
       PointerEventButton button;
       PointerEventKind kind;
       KeyboardModifiers modifiers;
       bool is_touch;
       friend bool operator==(const PointerEvent&, const PointerEvent&) = default;
       friend bool operator!=(const PointerEvent&, const PointerEvent&) = default;
   };
   struct PointerScrollEvent {
       float delta_x;
       float delta_y;
       KeyboardModifiers modifiers;
       friend bool operator==(const PointerScrollEvent&, const PointerScrollEvent&) = default;
       friend bool operator!=(const PointerScrollEvent&, const PointerScrollEvent&) = default;
   };
   using slint::language::KeyEvent;
   struct DropEvent {
       SharedString mime_type;
       SharedString data;
       LogicalPosition position;
       friend bool operator==(const DropEvent&, const DropEvent&) = default;
       friend bool operator!=(const DropEvent&, const DropEvent&) = default;
   };
   using slint::language::StandardListViewItem;
   struct TableColumn {
       SharedString title;
       float min_width;
       float horizontal_stretch;
       SortOrder sort_order;
       float width;
       friend bool operator==(const TableColumn&, const TableColumn&) = default;
       friend bool operator!=(const TableColumn&, const TableColumn&) = default;
   };
   struct FontMetrics {
       float ascent;
       float descent;
       float x_height;
       float cap_height;
       friend bool operator==(const FontMetrics&, const FontMetrics&) = default;
       friend bool operator!=(const FontMetrics&, const FontMetrics&) = default;
   };
   struct MenuEntry {
       SharedString title;
       Image icon;
       SharedString id;
       bool enabled;
       bool checkable;
       bool checked;
       bool has_sub_menu;
       bool is_separator;
       Keys shortcut;
       friend bool operator==(const MenuEntry&, const MenuEntry&) = default;
       friend bool operator!=(const MenuEntry&, const MenuEntry&) = default;
   };
   struct Edges {
       float left;
       float top;
       float right;
       float bottom;
       friend bool operator==(const Edges&, const Edges&) = default;
       friend bool operator!=(const Edges&, const Edges&) = default;
   };
   }
